svg.aria-label: Karpenter v1.5.3 upgrade triggers aggressive node consolidation causing large-scale EKS outage, PodDisruptionBudget gap allows simultaneous evictions, mitigation pattern and Karpenter operational best practices for cluster resilience.
svg.title: 2025-10-02: Karpenter v1.5.3 node consolidation outage, PDB mitigation

g.text: v1.5.3 default policy : parallel node delete :...
Consolidation policy default flip : node binpack churn
Disruption budget gap : multi-AZ pods evicted : LB 503...
Karpenter ignored PDB absence : drained all replicas...
Default disruption budget = 0 : no minAvailable guard :...
Pin Karpenter ver in chart : canary upgrade per AZ : alarm...
